description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 89.

Tier II: Destined

Prerequisite: Fated, Convergence

Written in the Stars. Increase an ability score of your choice by 2. Your maximum for that score is increased by 2 as well.

Fated Criticality. When you make an attack against a target within range, you can turn a miss or regular hit into a critical hit. Alternatively, when you make an ability check or saving throw, you can treat the d20 roll as a 20. You can choose to do so after rolling but before any of the roll’s effects are announced. Once you use this ability, you must finish a long rest before you can do so again.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
